reviews.name: Jasmin
reviews.text: Wow! This place was AMAZING! So clean, so cozy, and honestly even better than the photos. The owner was incredibly helpful and made the whole stay perfect. I'd stay here again without a second thought!

reviews.name: Happy
reviews.text: Loved our staycation here. And the hosts were all very warm and accommodating.

reviews.name: Rosalie
reviews.text: Tom and Rose are perfect hosts. They take time to ensure that what we need are provided. They are responsive on our requests and offered us a flexible time for check out since our flight would still be late in the afternoon. We will definitely go back to their place. We enjoyed every moment of our stay. Great hosts!

reviews.name: John
reviews.text: Amazing host, this was our second time staying at this Airbnb — both times were perfect. We will definitely stay here again next time in Davao City. Thomas and Rose have a great place and always keeping it nice. Thomas, Rose and Lot Lot are always friendly and kind, they keep their place so clean. If you're looking for a nice place in Davao City with a private pool don't pass on their place.

reviews.name: Kris
reviews.text: This beautiful location was worth every penny. Jang and I felt right at home — Rose and Thomas were incredibly friendly, helpful, and easy to talk to. I will be recommending this place to every person who wishes to travel to Davao. I will certainly be returning to this place myself. Thank you so much Rose and Thomas!!

reviews.name: Leoangelo
reviews.text: Mr. Tom and Ma'am Rose are very responsive, easy to communicate with. The place is so nice — my kids love it and me and my wife love the kitchen.

reviews.name: H.
reviews.text: Thanks for your kindness and your welcome. You have a great and beautiful home. Sure see you again.

reviews.name: Barry
reviews.text: Home away from home 🏡 We had a lovely time at Felisa's guest house and garden house. We enjoyed it so much we invited the rest of our family to join us and extended our stay for few more nights. The place is very peaceful and great for relaxing while bonding with your family. The hosts are always there for anything. They also cater delicious breakfast and dinner. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Lucia
reviews.text: It was the perfect place for what we needed! Rosemarie, Tom and the rest of their family bent over backwards to make us feel at home and comfortable. We have recommended this place to friends and family already.

reviews.name: Mary Rose Zyra
reviews.text: Very personalized stay. The sweet mango and the magnet is the best touch. Thank you for the great welcome.

reviews.name: David
reviews.text: What a lovely place, central to most things in Davao. The pool is gorgeous, the WiFi is good. The property is looked after by Lot Lot and she was so friendly and could not do enough to make us welcome. Will definitely be staying here next time.

reviews.name: Genevieve Rochelle
reviews.text: We were assisted very well, the food we ordered was great — all plated with generous servings. The house was clean and very comfortable. Also very convenient as it is near the highway. Thank you so much, we will be back. Lots of love for the Family ❤️

reviews.name: Evelyn A
reviews.text: This is a home away from home — perfect for family who loves to travel. Everything is at your fingertips, most of all the hospitality and warmth of the family who greets every guest. If you drive there is a garage you can use any time of the day.

reviews.name: Mona Fe
reviews.text: Rosemarie's place was one of the top Airbnb houses we had so far. The host Lot-Lot who stayed next door was very accommodating and helpful — true Filipino hospitality 😊. The house is so relaxing and the pool, the kids loved it. We will definitely come back and recommend it to all our friends.

reviews.name: Dan
reviews.text: This has been a wonderful place to stay. Everything was as described. The only thing not mentioned is the most wonderful and very kind host, who was always very helpful. It's nice and quiet, and very nice to sit outside with coffee in the morning overlooking the pool and the beautiful garden.

reviews.name: Edgar
reviews.text: A private rest house — bigger than a 2–3 bedroom condominium. Very accommodating neighbors. Near the highway. You can swim even at night. Overall we highly recommend you and your families.

reviews.name: Carlo
reviews.text: The house was perfect for our first family trip to the city! It's a short walk from groceries, pharmacy, and restaurants. The hosts provided everything we needed and were available at all times. It's definitely been one of our favourite holidays so far — would definitely recommend it to others!

reviews.name: Eiji
reviews.text: The place is really nice, clean and serene. The caretaker is very accommodating. Very accessible as it's near major roads.

reviews.name: William
reviews.text: The staff are all fantastic and take excellent care and assist you any way they can. I highly recommend them — the pool is kept very clean and the location is very good. I plan to return in six months to stay again.

reviews.name: Damon
reviews.text: This is our second time at Felisa's guest house. You won't be disappointed. Rosemarie and Lot Lot are so nice and will accommodate any needs. Nice safe area close to the main part of city. Very spacious, clean and the pool and garden are beautiful.

reviews.name: Alexandra
reviews.text: The place was clean, quiet and very accessible to everything (food, transportation, pharmacy, etc). Ms Lot Lot was also very helpful and made sure we got everything we needed and were comfortable during our stay.

reviews.name: Jerry
reviews.text: 2nd time staying and it was just as good as the last. I really appreciated the card welcoming me back.

reviews.name: Peter
reviews.text: We had a wonderful stay — much better than I expected. Very comfortable and spacious accommodation.

reviews.name: Damon
reviews.text: Wow, what an amazing place to stay. Quiet, clean, close to downtown by taxi, superb hospitality and we had the pool all to ourselves. If Lot Lot is there during your stay it's an added plus — so friendly, helpful and informative.
